name: python3-sklearn
title: python3-sklearn
summary: Python modules for machine learning and data mining - Python 3
description:
Python modules for machine learning and data mining - Python 3
scikit-learn is a collection of Python modules relevant to
machine/statistical learning and data mining.  Non-exhaustive list of
included functionality:
- Gaussian Mixture Models
- Manifold learning
- kNN
- SVM (via LIBSVM)
.
This package contains the Python 3 version.
